events.content: Preserved source-aware status fallback: Preserved source-aware status fallback

raw.question: Preserved source-aware status fallback
raw.reasoning: cubic identified that status 404 fallback was reading workspace integrations even for deployer_user-scoped personas; reusing fetchIntegrationsForScope preserves the same source contract as the primary status request

retrospective.summary: Addressed workforce#155 review feedback by making integration status fallback source-aware and adding deployer_user/workspace fallback regression tests. Verified @agentworkforce/deploy tests and full pnpm check.
